title.en: In desperation, they still decided to agree to ...

content.en:
Wuji Heavenly Palace saw that Taisu Palace had another sevenfold supreme realm, and it was completely desperate.

In addition, the Xuantian Alliance's many Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms attacked many territories of the Wuji Heavenly Palace together, and the Seven Supreme Dao Realms of the Wuji Heavenly Palace did not dare to go out at all.

In desperation, they still decided to agree to Taisu Palace's conditions.

Of course, it was not the initial condition, but the condition that was laid down after repeated peace talks.

According to the conditions, once the calamity came, the Infinite Heavenly Palace needed to eliminate more than sixty percent of the threefold Supreme Dao Realm, and it had to send twelve sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms.

Moreover, the Infinite Heavenly Palace relinquished the dominant position of the Infinite Domain, and the Xuantian Alliance dominated the Infinite Domain.

Not only that, but they also had to compensate the Xuantian League for their massive resources.

It can be said that after this battle, the Wuji Heavenly Palace is equivalent to a complete decline.

However, they are also helpless, at least after doing so, they still have a chance to turn the tables.

If they continue to fight, they will have no chance of turning the tables.

Subsequently.

The two sides signed an agreement, and this battlefield was tantamount to a complete end.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Many Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables were still very dissatisfied with the decision of the Sixth Heavenly Venerable.

"Sixth Heavenly Venerable, now that we are surrendered to the Xuantian Alliance headed by Taisu Palace, when the calamity comes, is it possible that we really have to send twelve Sevenfold Dao Realm?" asked one of the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

"When the time comes, let's get through the current level first, and if we open the No. 1 Treasure House and find the resources that allow me to break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, then the Taisu Palace is nothing, and we can continue to take back control of the Infinite Domain. "

Liuqi Tianzun said with a smile.

At this time, these Tianzun knew that Liuqi Tianzun still had such a plan, no wonder he agreed to the extremely excessive conditions of Taisu Palace.

"But what if you don't have the resources that will allow you to step into the Eightfold Dao Realm?"

A sevenfold supreme realm asked.

Liuqi Tianzun smiled and said: "That's also simple, just take a group of Dao Realm to leave the Wuji Domain, a hundred battles Tianzun can escape, why can't we escape?"

Many Supreme Dao Realms were stunned, could they still do this?

However, there are too many Supreme Dao Realms under the command of Wuji Heavenly Palace, and they will definitely not be able to take them all away, and they will inevitably be abandoned when the time comes.

But it's really the day of the catastrophe, if you don't leave, you will die, they don't want to be cannon fodder!

"Then it's decided!"

The other sevenfold realms nodded.

Immediately, they did their best to assist the Six Crying Heavenly Venerables to crack the formation of the No. 1 Treasure House, and strive to open the No. 1 Treasure House as soon as possible.

......

The third odd place.

Canglin Realm.

Ye Tian had already killed a lot of Supreme Dao Strange Objects here, and he had obtained a lot of Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

Moreover, he also arranged the Supreme Dao Strange Array, where he comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao.

Over the years, his Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule has progressed rapidly.

In the beginning, he was just a point.

But now, his seventh sequence supreme path rules had reached the realm of three into seven, and he was still improving rapidly.

Of course, he also consumed a lot of Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

Time passed, and dozens of solstice epochs passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation had finally stepped into the peak of the Triple Supreme Dao Realm, and his Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Realm had reached fifty out of two.

"Those seventh-sequence Supreme Dao rule items in my hand have been exhausted, I have to continue to kill some Supreme Dao strange things, those originally powerful Supreme Dao strange things, I should be sure to kill them now!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He began to look for those powerful Supreme Dao Strange Things, these Supreme Dao Strange Objects were the top among the Seven Supreme Dao Realms, and their strength was not weaker than that of the Taisu Palace Master.

If it weren't for the Blood Pattern Tablet, Ye Tian would naturally be killed by the other party in one go.

But with the help of the Blood Pattern Tablet, he had a way to besiege and kill the other party.

this day.

Ye Tian found a top-notch sevenfold supreme Dao artifact, which was the Dragon Shadow Sword.

The terrifying sword qi carried the power of the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules and tore apart all things, and the seventh sequence supreme dao rules on his body were definitely more than ten times that of other supreme dao strange things, so that only by killing such supreme dao strange things could he get more seventh sequence supreme dao strange objects.

"Blood Monument, Town!"

The Blood Pattern Tablet urged, and the aura of the Dragon Shadow Sword, a strange thing of the Dao, began to decrease, gradually decreasing to the level of the weakest sevenfold Dao realm.

The weakest Sevenfold Dao Realm is still the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and it is very difficult to kill the other party with Ye Tian's strength.

But.

Ye Tian's real body copy body descended, and began to besiege and kill the Dao Strange Thing Dragon Shadow Sword.

Thundered!!!!!

The Great War has begun!

The Dragon Shadow Sword used a terrifying killing move, but it couldn't help Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's seventh sequence of supreme dao rules was too powerful, and there were many true body copies of the body, and they united to suppress the supreme dao strange thing dragon shadow sword.

The ultimate spear technique!

This seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao Divine Power was unleashed, and it was performed by multiple true body copy bodies together, and under the attack again and again, it finally broke the defense of the Dragon Shadow Sword, a strange object of the Supreme Dao.

Click!

The Dragon Shadow Sword cracked, which meant that the Dragon Shadow Sword was about to be destroyed.

After another period of time, there were more and more cracks on the Dragon Shadow Sword, and the aura naturally became lower and lower.

Finally.

Bang!

The Dragon Shadow Sword was completely shattered, and the strange figure dissipated, representing that the Dragon Shadow Sword had no power to resist and completely turned into pieces.

Wow!

Ye Tian grabbed one of the fragments, and this fragment was the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item.

"This piece of fragment is equivalent to dozens of pieces in the past!"

Ye Tian is quite satisfied.

Collect more items like this for the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, so that he can comprehend the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules to a higher realm!

Those truly top-notch Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms and Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules have all reached the realm of more than ninety percent, or even ten percent.

So, he has to at least understand it to this extent!

In the following days, Ye Tianwei killed one top Dao Strange Thing after another, and harvested a lot of Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items.

Subsequently, he once again used the Great Array of Dao Strange Objects to comprehend the seventh sequence of the Dao rules.

With more Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, his Seventh Sequence Supreme Rule progresses faster.

Time flies.

Hundreds of years have passed.

"My Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule has reached the ninety percent realm!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

At this rate, he would go to the Second Strange Land again and collect some items from the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, which should be able to raise the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to a tenth-percent realm.

Moreover, over the years, his other true body replica bodies have also created the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Powers, and he has also created a variety of Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Powers.

And his cultivation has also reached the peak realm of the Triple Dao Realm, which is not far from the true limit.

Now, his combat power had reached the level of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, which was not weak.

The peak cultivation of the Triple Supreme Dao Realm, the combat power is comparable to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, even other existences that take the Extreme Dao Realm can't do it!

As strong as the Taibai Sword Master, his cultivation has reached the sixth-fold Dao realm, and the seventh sequence to the Dao rule realm is only ten percent of the realm, and he is not far from this realm.
